flashcards.example: Muraho! Aba hano? (Hello, there!)
Urakoze cyane ku bufasha bwawe. (Thank you for your help)
Murakoze, mugire ijoro ryiza. (Thank you, have a good night)
Ndagukunda cyane (I love you so much!)
Ndi gukora umukoro. (I am doing a homework)
Ntacyo bitwaye. (It is nothing)
Oya, ntabwo nshobora kubikora ubu. (No, I cannot do it now)
Umugabo wanjye agera mu rugo nijoro. (My husband gets home at night)
Ndashaka gusura umujyi wa Kigali. (I want to visit Kigali City)
Mfite igitabo cyiza cyo gusoma. (I have a good book to read)
Tegereza gato, ndaje mukanya. (Wait, I will be back soon)
Ndagusabye, mbabarira! (I beg, please forgive me)
Umuryango wanjye ni mugari. (My family is extended)
Inshuti yanjye irikunda. (My friend is selfish)
Ndumva ibyo uvuze mbikunze. (I love what you are saying)
Ni byiza ko tugira ubumwe. (It is good to have unity)
Uyu munsi ni mwiza. (Today is a good day!)
Imana irahari kugirango iturinde amage. (God is here to protect us from misfortune)
Ngwino hano tuvugane.(Come here, let’s talk!)
Warakoze cyane kubw'urukundo rwawe. (Thank you for your love!)
Umuhanda mwiza, tuzongera ubutaha. (Safe journey, see you later!)
Umugore wanjye ni mwiza. (My wife is beautiful)
Umugisha w’Imana urasumbya byose. (God's blessing surpasses everything)
Byose ni sawa.(Everything is okay)
Akunda gusoma ikinyamakuru. (He likes reading the newspaper)
Nta kibazo mfite.(I don't have a problem)
Ndi umwana w'Imana. (I am a child of God)
Ndabizi ko bigoye.(I know that it is complicated)
Ikaze mu gikoni cyacu. (Welcome to our kitchen)
Ibyishimo bituruka ku mutima unyuzwe. (Happines comes from a satisfied heart)
Ndicaye ngaho mbwira. (I am sitting, then tell me)
Ejo hazaza tuzagusura. (Tomorrow we will visit you)
Urukundo rutuma isi izenguruka. (Love makes the world go around)
Naguze telefone ku isoko. (I bought a phone at the market)
Komeza utere imbere. (Continue developing)
Ntugire ubwoba, turi kumwe. (Don't be afraid, we are together)
Ndategereje, igisubizo cyawe.(I am waiting, for yor your response)
Reka tugende, igihe kirageze. (Let's go, the time has come)
Ishuri ryacu rirakomeye. (out school is strong)
Mwaramutse, mwese. (Good morning, everyone!)
Ariko ndashaka kurya. (But I want to eat)
Ndi kwiga kuboha.(I am learning to knit)
Mbabarira kuba natinze.(forgive me that I was late)
Ndashaka amazi akonje. (I want cold water)
Uraho mama? (How are you mother?)
Mbega ibiryo biryoshye! (What delicious food!)
Ifoto yawe ni nziza. (Your photo is good)
Inzu yanjye ni nini. (My house is big)
Ndashaka kurya imboga. (I want to eat vegetables)
Ndashaka amakara. (I want charcoal)
Ndashaka kunywa amata. (I want to drink milk)
Ayo mafaranga ni menshi. (That's a lot of money)
Igihe kirageze ngo uhinduke. (It is time for you to change)
Murakaza neza mu rugo rwacu.
Ndumva ushaka kuvuga icyo kibazo.
Mama wanjye ni umuganga.
Data ni umuyobozi mwiza.
Ndagukumbuye cyane.
Ndashaka kwandika ibaruwa.
Ibintu byose ntabwo bigenda neza.
Musaza wanjye ariga mu butaliyani.
Mushiki wanjye akunda kuririmba. (My sisters likes singing)
Gusoma ibitabo birafasha cyane. (Reading books, helps a lot)
Ndagushaka kugira ngo tuganire. (I want to have a conversation with you)
Rya vuba. (Eat faster)
Nzaza buhoro buhoro. (I will come solowly)
Nkunda inkoko zokeje cyane. (I like grilled chicken so much)
Wagize neza kwitabira ibirori byacu.(Thank you for attending our party)
Ndashaka kuryama hakiri kare uyu munsi. (I want to sleep early today)
Wowe ufite akazi keza. (You have a great job)
Hagararira aho ugeze. (Stop right there where you are)
Ndagusaba gushishoza. (I ask you to be careful)
Ubu ndi kugenda. (I am walking now)
Nimugoroba turasenga. (We will pray tonight)
Ndashaka kubyinana nawe. (I want to dance with you)
Ndifuza kwiga mu mahanga. (I wish to study abroad)
Afite impano yo kuririmba neza. (He/She has a gift of singing)
Mugitondo ndakora imyitozo. (I will work out in the morning)
Gufasha abatishoboye ni byiza. (Helping the helpless is good)
Ndagukeneye mu buzima bwanjye. (I need you in my life)
Ndashaka gutanga impano. (I want to give a gift)
Ijoro ryose ni rirerire. (The whole night is long)
Gusiba amagambo. (Erasing the words)
Nkunda kwakira abashyitsi. (I like receiving visitors)
Ndaje nonaha. (I am coming now)
Nshobora gusigara hano. (I might stay here)
Abana bakunda gukina imikino y’ubufindo. (Children like to play guessing games)
Tuzabikora nanone ku munsi w'ejo. (We will do it again tommorrow)
Ndagiye mu rugo ubu. (I am gong home right now)
Ndashaka kugura ibyo kurya. (I wan tto buy food)
Afite ibintu byo kugurisha. (She/ he has things to sell)
Sinshobora kwibagirwa izina ryawe. (I cannot forget your name)
Ndibuka amazina yanyu mwese. (I remember all your names)
Gutekereza neza birakenewe. (Good thinking is necessary)
Ndashaka kumenya byinshi bikwerekeyeho. (I want to know more about you)
Ndashaka kugenda imvura ihise. (I want to go when it stops raining)
Ndiruka buri gitondo. (I run every morning )
Kwicara ku ntebe ni byiza.
Murabeho, tuzabonana ejo. (Bye, bye, see you tomorrow!)
Kuwa mbere nzabaza umuyobozi. (On Monday, I will ask the leader)
Kuwa kabiri, nkorera mu rugo. (On Tuesdays, I work from home )
Kuwa gatatu tuzagira inama. (On Wednesday, we will have a meeting)
Kuwa kane ni umunsi w'imyidagaduro. (Thursdays are for leisure)
Kuwa gatanu, tuzagira ikiruhuko. (On Friday, we will have a day off)
Kuwa gatandatu, mfite isabukuru y’amavuko. (I have a birthday on Saturday)
Tuza kurira hamwe ku cyumweru. (We eat together on Sunday)
Ndababara umutwe. (My head hurts)
Yakomerekeje ukuboko kwe . (He/ she hurt his/her arm)
Ukuguru kwari kubabaye. (The leg was hurt)
Ijisho ry'ibumoso rifite ibibazo. (The left eye has a problem)
Izuru ryanjye rifite ibibazo. (My nose has a problem)
Umunwa w’ihene. (A goat’s mouth)
Ugutwi kumva neza ni ingenzi. (An ear that hears well is necessary)
Inda nini y’uruyuki. (a big bee belly)
Umutima wanjye urakomeye. (My heart is strong)
Umugongo mugari. (A wide back)

Ukwaha kwawe kuranuka.(Your armpit stinks)

Ijosi ryanjye ni rirerire. (My neck is long)
Ryama mu gituza cyanjye. (Lay on my chest)
Uzaririra ku rutugu rwanjye. (You will cry on my shoulder)
Ivi ry’inzovu. (An elephant’s knee)
Ikirenge cyawe kirakuruta. (Your foot is bigger than you)
Inkokora nk’izihene. (Elbow like a goat’s)
Uruhu rwanjye ruroroshye. (My skin is soft)
Igufwa ry’isazi.(A fly’s bone)
Amaraso y’umukara. (Dark blood)
Umutsi w’ukuguru. (The leg vein)
Afite ururimi ku mavi. (She/ he has a tongue on the knees)
Mfite iryinyo rya zahabu.(I have a golden tooth)
Umusatsi we uroroshye. (Her hair is soft)
Nkunda imbavu zawe. (I like your ribs)
Urwara rumwe. (One nail)
Intare y’umweru. (a white lion )
Inzovu y’umutku. (A red lion)
Ingwe yihuta cyane. (a leopard is fast)

Impyisi zihiga nijoro. (Hyenas hunt at night)
Imbwa Ziramoka. (Dogs bark)
Injangwe y'umukara. (A black cat)

Inka zacu zirabyibushye. (Our cows are fat)
Inkoko zitera amagi. (Checkens lay eggs)
Ingurube zanyuze mu gisenge.
Inkende irashakira imbuto.
Inzoka isohotse mu gisenge.
Inyoni iririmba mu gitondo.
Inuma itumye amahoro mu muryango.
Igisiga cyagaragaye ku musozi.
Ifi irashaka amazi asukuye.
Ingona yaramuritse mu mazi.
Imvubu irashaka kujya mu ruzi.
Twiga iri gufata ibiti binini.
Imparage zirahura mu murima.
Urukwavu rwacu ruri ku rugero rwiza.
Imbeba iri mu nzu.
Ingagi yacu yabonye izuba mu ishyamba.
Umuceri uri ku isahani.

Ibigori biri ku murima.

Ibirayi byatetse mu gikoni.
Ibitoki biri ku isoko.
Ibijumba bishyushye ni byiza cyane.
Inyama ziri ku isahani yanjye.

Amata akonje aryoheye gushira inyota.

Isukari irimo gukorwa mu nganda.
Umugati uraboneka mu iguriro.
Keke niyo dusangira ku isabukuru.
Ikawa ivuguruza ibitotsi mu gitondo.
Icyayi kinyobwa mu gitondo. (Tea is drunk in the morning)

Igi ryatogoshejwe.(Hard-boiled egg)
Ubunyobwa bukaranze. (Roasted peanuts)
Inyoni zikunda amasaka.(Birds like sorghum)
Igikoma kinyobwa mu gitondo. (Porridge is drunk in the morning)

Inzu yacu ni nini. (Our house is big)
Ishuri rifunguye saa mbiri. (School opens at 8 o'clock)

Inkoko itera amagi. (The chicken lays eggs)

Imvura igwa cyane. (It's raining heavily)
